title: Cicercula sativa
taxonomy: Cicercula sativa is classified as a species of minute air-breathing land snail, a type of gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the phylum Mollusca and the class Gastropoda. Further classification places it within the order Stylommatophora, family Hydrobiidae, and genus Cicercula. Cicercula sativa is one of several species within the genus, which is primarily found in Europe. The specific classification of Cicercula sativa reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the mollusk family.
benefits: Unfortunately, I don't have information on the health benefits of Cicercula sativa.
